title: Receipes window is too small

posts.author: YossiT (yossi  turgeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

We have an application with several recipes, the recipes windows is too small to see which is which as they all have similar names with a couple words as the difference, usually at the end.
Can you please make the recipes windows to fit to screen size or at least have a tool tip with the recipes text ? I would love to have recipes with recipes names so you can sort it by the name.

image1826×1224 170 KB

Thank you so much in advance
Yossi

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @YossiT,

Thank you for the feedback!

I have changed this into a feature request so that our team is in the loop and others can vote for it

Cheers,
Matias
